description.description: Defines the description for the Neptune parameter group, providing context for its purpose or usage.

family.description: Specifies the Neptune DB parameter group family, which determines the compatibility of the parameter group with a specific Neptune engine version.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Neptune parameter group, must be unique within the account.

name_prefix.description: Defines a prefix for the name of the Neptune parameter group, which must be unique within the AWS account and region.

parameter.description: Defines the custom parameters for the Neptune database parameter group, specifying configuration settings to optimize database performance and behavior.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize, categorize, and manage the Neptune parameter group.
